task_objective: Fix selected game dropdown synchronization and settings queue exceptions
design_decisions: Synchronized `lastQueuedSelectedGame` reactively with `selectedGame` from the store using a `useEffect`. Wrapped setting queue notifications in `try-catch` blocks to protect settings serialization queue execution. Guarded settings failure notifications behind sequence check filters to prevent out-of-order/stale failure toasts from being displayed.
results: All tests passed successfully, typescript typechecks passed, and package zipped cleanly.
